close_reason: Core ObjectStorage foundation complete: behaviour, LocalFilesystem backend, Keys, Chunk format/writer/reader, Snapshot storage, ClusterState. Deferred work (S3/GCS, caching, compaction) moved to independent tickets.
description: Both Demux (writes chunks) and Materializer (reads/writes snapshots) depend on this abstraction. Deliverables: ObjectStorage behaviour, conditional PUT/get/list API, local filesystem impl, S3/GCS impls, disk caching. REQUIRES PLANNING: This epic needs additional planning and subtask creation before work can begin.
title: Object Storage Foundation
